website.name: Vault
website.idea: An AI prompt marketplace where creators publish tested prompt systems for marketing, design, development, research, media, and operations.
website.tagline: Prompt systems that ship outcomes, not guesses.

sources.name: Google DeepMind Gemini
sources.notes: Used for model positioning: multimodal, reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows.

sources.name: Runway
sources.notes: Used for video-generation and world-model capability descriptors.

sources.name: Claude Product Overview
sources.notes: Used for coding, analysis, and task delegation descriptors.

sources.name: Unsplash Source Images
sources.notes: Card imagery references with query parameters for responsive rendering.

prompts.title: Cold Email That Converts - B2B Outreach Framework
prompts.short_description: Personalized outbound email engine for SaaS and agencies.
prompts.promptText: Create personalized cold emails from ICP profile, trigger events, and product angle. Return 3 variants with subject lines and CTA testing.

prompts.title: Cinematic Product Shot - Dark Studio v7
prompts.short_description: Studio-grade product visual prompts for launch campaigns.
prompts.promptText: Generate premium product-shot prompts with lens, material, light ratio, and brand-safe style controls.

prompts.title: Twitter Thread That Goes Viral - 12 Tweet Framework
prompts.short_description: Idea-to-thread engine with hooks, proof, and authority loops.
prompts.promptText: Transform any topic into a 12-tweet narrative with hook formulas, insight scaffolds, and conversion CTA.

prompts.title: React Component from Figma Description
prompts.short_description: Convert design specs into production-ready React/TS code.
prompts.promptText: Given visual and interaction details, output accessible React + TypeScript components with tailwind classes and variants.

prompts.title: Neon Cyberpunk Cityscape - Night Scene
prompts.short_description: Detailed cyberpunk concept frames with lighting recipes.
prompts.promptText: Produce futuristic city scene prompts with rain, reflections, lens artifacts, and cinematic movement.

prompts.title: Full Stack Architecture Document Generator
prompts.short_description: Generate scalable system design docs from requirements.
prompts.promptText: Take PRD and constraints; output architecture decisions, modules, APIs, data models, risks, and phased rollout.

prompts.title: Investor Pitch Narrative Builder - Series A Ready
prompts.short_description: Investor-grade storyline and deck structure generator.
prompts.promptText: Craft a fundraise narrative with market framing, traction storytelling, moat, GTM, and slide-by-slide guidance.

prompts.title: LinkedIn Thought Leadership Post Engine
prompts.short_description: Authority-building posts for B2B founders and PMs.
prompts.promptText: Generate opinionated LinkedIn posts with POV hook, narrative arc, and non-generic CTA tuned to target audience.

prompts.title: Brand Voice Guidelines - Full System Document
prompts.short_description: Build a reusable brand voice and messaging operating system.
prompts.promptText: Turn product, audience, and positioning into voice principles, tone matrix, examples, do-don'ts, and channel stylebook.

prompts.title: Autonomous Research and Outreach Agent
prompts.short_description: Agentic workflow to find leads, enrich data, and draft outreach.
prompts.promptText: Plan and run a multi-step workflow: research accounts, synthesize pain points, generate personalized messages, and create follow-up tasks.

prompts.title: Podcast Episode Script - Interview Format
prompts.short_description: Interview script framework with pacing and segment timing.
prompts.promptText: Draft host questions, segue lines, counterpoints, and episode structure for a compelling interview episode.

prompts.title: Architectural Visualization - Interior Render
prompts.short_description: Prompt pack for photoreal interior concept visuals.
prompts.promptText: Generate interior render prompts with design language, material references, camera framing, and daylight simulations.

prompts.title: Market Research and Competitor Deep Dive Report
prompts.short_description: Structured market intelligence report from raw signals.
prompts.promptText: Build a competitive landscape, pricing model comparison, SWOT, and strategy recommendations with confidence notes.

prompts.title: Hyper-Realistic Food Photography - Studio Light
prompts.short_description: Food ad visuals with composition and lens consistency.
prompts.promptText: Generate delicious product-style food prompts with lens profile, garnish cues, and editorial plating direction.

prompts.title: Fantasy Portrait - Oil Painting Realism
prompts.short_description: Character portrait prompts for high-fidelity fantasy art.
prompts.promptText: Create portrait prompts with historical painter references, mood palettes, and story-rich wardrobe details.

prompts.title: YouTube Shorts Hook Generator
prompts.short_description: 50 hook variations tailored for short-form retention.
prompts.promptText: Generate short-form hooks with pattern interrupts, curiosity gap, and topic-matched opening scripts.

prompts.title: Runway Storyboard to Shot Plan
prompts.short_description: Storyboard sequence generator for short cinematic edits.
prompts.promptText: Turn script beats into runway-ready shot prompts with movement, camera and transition metadata.

prompts.title: Python API Integration Assistant
prompts.short_description: Build robust API clients with retries, typing and tests.
prompts.promptText: Given endpoint docs, generate a typed Python client, retry middleware, error map, and pytest suite.

prompts.title: Customer Support Macro Library Builder
prompts.short_description: High-empathy, policy-safe support response templates.
prompts.promptText: Create ticket response macro library with tiered tone variants, escalation rules and SLA-compliant replies.

prompts.title: Legal Contract Clause Explainer
prompts.short_description: Plain-language summaries and risk flags for contracts.
prompts.promptText: Read contract text, summarize obligations by party, highlight negotiation risks, and suggest clarification prompts.

prompts.title: Instagram Reel Concept Sprint
prompts.short_description: 30 reel concepts with hook-angle-shot blueprint.
prompts.promptText: Create weekly reel concept board with scene structure, visual beats, and caption formulas.

prompts.title: Data Room DD Checklist Generator
prompts.short_description: Founder due-diligence checklist and evidence map.
prompts.promptText: Generate investor DD checklist segmented by finance, product, legal, GTM and team, with ownership and proof links.

prompts.title: DALL-E Abstract Geometry Art Generator
prompts.short_description: Abstract visual generation with consistent geometry motifs.
prompts.promptText: Generate abstract geometry prompts with palette locks, composition constraints and variation controls.

prompts.title: SEO Programmatic Cluster Blueprint
prompts.short_description: Programmatic SEO plan with page templates and interlinking.
prompts.promptText: Build content cluster map, template fields, schema recommendations and internal link strategy for topical authority.
